title: 8-Piece Measuring Cups and Spoons Kitchen Nesting Measurement Tools for Liquids and Solids
features: 【SAFE MATERIAL & EASY TO USE】HINMAY measuring cups and spoons set made of black nylon and metal handles , sizes engraved in handles for measuring dry and wet ingredients. No more guesswork, convenience home kitchen gadget tool for cooking and baking.
【4 PCS MEASURING CUPS & 4 PCS MEASURING SPOONS】1 Cup (236ml), 1/2 Cup (118ml), 1/3 Cup (78ml), 1/4 Cup (59ml) and 1 tbsp (15ml), 1/2 tbsp (7.5ml), 1 tsp (5ml), 1/2 tsp (2.5ml)

【MULTIFUNCTIONAL】Enjoy our portable measuring cups and spoons set to DIY your favorite cakes, snacks, cookies, desserts, sauces and drinks, Suitable for coffee, flour, grains, lentils, sugars, spices, honey, oils, liquids and pet food feeding. Making them ideal for daily use.

【PRECISE MEASUREMENTS AND NESTING】Kitchen nesting measurement jugs and spoons set is stackable to save storage pace and dishwasher safe. Each measuring cup is designed with spout. The measuring cups and spoons have imperial measurements stamped on the handles.

【CUSTOMER SATISFACTION IS OUR #1 PRIORITY】When you purchase this measuring cups and spoons tool, you're offered a 100% CUSTOMER SATISFACTION SERVICE. Just contact us through your order if you have any questions and we will serve you until you get your 100% satisfaction. Try it risk free!!

Please wash the measuring cups and spoons with warm soapy water before first using in order to wash off any residue left from the manufacturing process. 2. Avoid contact with knives and scissors to prevent the cup and spoon from being scratched or damaged to maintain durability. 3. Can be used for dry or liquid measurements，flat base allows it to lay upright and more. Measuring pet food portions (dog, cat, bird, etc.) or even ingredients while cooking or baking.
